title: Party Disparities
entries: (distant) A summoner is hidden far away and will continue to summon enemies.
(distant) A summoner is hidden amongst a crowd of innocents and will continue to summon enemies.
(distant) A sniper is far away and has a bead on the characters.
(distant) The foe attacks from a superior height advantage.
(distant) The foe strikes and hides/becomes ethereal.
(distant) The foe attacks in the dream world.
(distant) The foe attacks with many illusions.
(distant) The villain attacks by leaving traps.
(eternal) The enemy has a very high AC and a way to impose disadvantage.
(eternal) The enemy has a very good saving throw.
(eternal) The enemy has a lot of HP and many resistances, but a few specific vulnerabilities.
(eternal) The enemy just regenerates at 0 HP unless a specific action is taken.
(eternal) The enemy regenerates unless a specific action is taken.
(eternal) The enemy respawns unless a specific action is taken.
(alternate) Killing the foe will prevent the players from getting what they want. He has to be defeated in a specific way.
(alternate) The foe is a mind-controlled ally.
(alternate) The foe is fighting on terrain advantageous to them, and the hero is in danger from that terrain.
(alternate) One of the enemies is merely a simulacrum.
(alternate) There is a curse that requires a very specific set of actions to be taken or not taken.
(alternate) The goal is a race to the thing the villain is trying to get to. Success is just slowing the other down.
(alternate) The battle is in a town, and killing/maiming would have worse consequences than losing.
(alternate) There are multiple powerful foes that can only be defeated if they can be tricked into fighting each other.
(alternate) There are multiple foes that are enemies themselves. The heroes must stop them from killing each other.
(alternate) The battle takes place in an environment where some cooperation with the foe is necessary to survive.
(powerful) The foe’s attacks cripple.
(powerful) The foe is overwhelming in melee.
(powerful) The villain is attempting to force the hero to use a specific tactic, and is powerful enough to be dangerous despite this self-imposed disadvantage.
(powerful) The foe can read minds and predict every move.
(powerful) The enemy leaves wounds that fester. They attack and run before striking again later.
(powerful) The villain has overwhelming minions that will leave if they are defeated.
(powerful) The villain is invulnerable save for a weak point on their body that is difficult to reach or expose.
(powerful) The villain has overwhelming power over the hero (minions mostly), and they have to wait for the right time to strike.
(weak hero) There are innocents that the villain is attacking, or perhaps just one target.
(weak hero) The heroes have been fighting for a very long time and are greatly weakened.
(weak hero) The villain has cornered a single hero who needs to get help or just survive long enough to win.
(weak hero) The villain has a powerful attack, but it needs specific circumstances to pull off.
(weak hero) The hero can’t afford to use all their power yet.
(weak hero) The circumstances require the hero to fight honorably, even when the villain doesn’t.
(environmental) The battle takes place in an area with unpredictable and hazardous weather conditions.
(environmental) The foe has control over the terrain, manipulating it to their advantage.
(environmental) The hero is fighting underwater, facing mobility and breathing challenges.
(environmental) The hero is fighting in a crumbling or collapsing structure, making footing unstable.
(environmental) The foe uses environmental hazards like explosive barrels or collapsing objects.
(environmental) The battle occurs in a magical or technological anomaly that warps reality unpredictably.
(time-sensitive) The hero is on a time limit, and if they don't defeat the foe quickly, something disastrous happens.
(time-sensitive) The foe becomes stronger or gains new abilities as time passes, encouraging a swift victory.
(time-sensitive) The hero can only harm the foe during specific celestial events or phases.
(time-sensitive) The battle takes place during a temporal flux, causing intermittent time stops or skips.
(emotional) The foe has a strong psychological hold over the hero, exploiting their fears or traumas.
(emotional) The hero is filled with doubt and must find inner strength to overcome the powerful foe.
(emotional) The foe is an old friend or family member, and the hero struggles with conflicting emotions.
(emotional) The hero's actions are being manipulated by the villain, causing them to fight against their allies.
(technological) The foe possesses advanced technology, giving them an edge in combat.
(technological) The hero faces an enemy powered by ancient or alien artifacts of immense power.
(technological) The villain has access to powerful, automated war machines or combat drones.
(technological) The battle occurs in a virtual reality simulation where the foe has the advantage.
(strategic) The hero must protect a vulnerable NPC or object while facing a formidable adversary.
(strategic) The foe employs ingenious tactics, requiring the hero to adapt their strategy during the battle.
(strategic) The battle is part of a larger war, and the hero must consider the overall strategy.
(strategic) The villain has superior intelligence, anticipating the hero's moves and countering them effectively.
(divine) The foe wields divine powers granted by a deity or god.
(divine) The hero must confront a celestial being testing their worthiness or challenging their beliefs.
(divine) The villain is a chosen champion of a powerful divine entity.
(divine) The battle takes place in a sacred or cursed location, affecting the powers of those within it.
(interdimensional) The foe can phase in and out of reality, making them hard to predict and hit.
(interdimensional) The hero faces an opponent from another plane of existence with strange abilities.
(interdimensional) The battle occurs in a shifting, otherworldly realm with bizarre rules of physics.
(interdimensional) The villain manipulates portals to summon reinforcements or launch surprise attacks.
(cursed) The foe possesses a cursed item that grants them immense power at a cost.
(cursed) The hero is afflicted by a curse that weakens them or affects their abilities.
(cursed) The villain has made a pact with dark forces, gaining power at the expense of their own soul.
(cursed) The battle takes place in a cursed land, sapping the hero's strength as they fight.
(psychological) The foe uses illusions to deceive and disorient the hero during the battle.
(psychological) The hero is trapped in a nightmarish dreamscape and must face their inner demons.
(psychological) The villain manipulates the hero's emotions to provoke mistakes and rash decisions.
(psychological) The hero must resist the temptation of the foe's promises or offers of power.
(ancient magic) The foe has awakened ancient magic that grants them formidable abilities.
(ancient magic) The hero needs to decipher and counter ancient runes or spells to weaken the villain.
(ancient magic) The villain draws power from ancient relics scattered across the world.
(ancient magic) The battle takes place in an ancient battleground infused with residual magic.
(technomagic) The foe blends technology and magic, making them a formidable high-tech spellcaster.
(technomagic) The hero faces a weaponized golem or construct with advanced magical enhancements.
(technomagic) The villain controls a network of automatons or drones with deadly precision.
(technomagic) The battle occurs in a virtual reality created by the villain, where they are all-powerful.
(cosmic alignment) The hero and villain gain incredible power during a rare cosmic event.
(cosmic alignment) The foe harnesses the energy of celestial bodies, becoming stronger at night.
(cosmic alignment) The battle takes place during an eclipse, granting unique powers to both sides.
(cosmic alignment) The hero and villain's powers are amplified by the alignment of specific stars.
(forbidden knowledge) The foe has uncovered forbidden knowledge granting them unnatural abilities.
(forbidden knowledge) The hero must find and wield a tome of forbidden magic to match the villain's power.
(forbidden knowledge) The villain's dark rituals threaten to tear the fabric of reality apart.
(forbidden knowledge) The battle takes place within a forbidden temple where the villain gains power.
(reality-warping) The foe can manipulate reality, twisting the battlefield and the hero's surroundings.
(reality-warping) The hero faces an opponent capable of altering the laws of physics at will.
(reality-warping) The villain's illusions become real and lethal upon contact with the hero.
(reality-warping) The battle takes place in a fractured reality with shifting dimensions and gravity.
(cultural advantage) The villain belongs to a culture with unique combat techniques unfamiliar to the hero.
(cultural advantage) The hero is fighting on foreign soil, facing a disadvantage due to unfamiliar terrain.
(cultural advantage) The battle involves a ritual that grants the villain blessings from their ancestors.
(cultural advantage) The hero must navigate a labyrinthine structure designed by the villain's culture.
(technological edge) The foe possesses advanced technology that grants them an advantage in combat.
(technological edge) The hero faces an opponent in a futuristic exoskeleton with powerful weaponry.
(technological edge) The villain controls drones or robots with superior firepower and precision.
(technological edge) The battle takes place in a high-tech facility with numerous automated defenses.
(elemental mastery) The foe wields control over a powerful elemental force like a raging storm or volcanic eruptions.
(elemental mastery) The hero must find a way to counter the villain's control over the elements.
(elemental mastery) The villain can transform into an elemental form, gaining enhanced abilities.
(elemental mastery) The battle occurs in an area with wild, unstable elemental energies.
(time manipulation) The foe possesses the ability to manipulate time, granting them brief glimpses of the future.
(time manipulation) The hero faces a time-traveling enemy, making them difficult to predict and hit.
(time manipulation) The villain can create time loops, repeating the battle until they achieve victory.
(time manipulation) The battle takes place in a pocket dimension with distorted time flow.
(astral energy) The foe harnesses the power of the astral plane, granting them ethereal abilities.
(astral energy) The hero must temporarily project their consciousness to the astral plane to fight back.
(astral energy) The villain's attacks can disrupt the hero's connection between body and soul.
(astral energy) The battle takes place on a mystical battlefield that intersects with the astral plane.
(enchanted minions) The foe commands an army of enchanted beings with unique and formidable skills.
(enchanted minions) The hero must face waves of ever-respawning, enchanted adversaries.
(enchanted minions) The villain's minions are bound by a magical contract that compels them to obey.
(enchanted minions) The battle occurs in a cursed land where fallen warriors rise again as powerful undead.
(techno-organic symbiosis) The foe fuses technology and organic matter, granting them regenerative abilities.
(techno-organic symbiosis) The hero faces a cybernetically enhanced enemy with cyber-organic weaponry.
(techno-organic symbiosis) The villain's symbiotic link with their technology makes them harder to disable.
(techno-organic symbiosis) The battle takes place in a corrupted landscape where machinery and nature merge.
(time-sensitive) The hero is on a time-critical mission, and delaying the villain could lead to disastrous consequences.
(time-sensitive) The battle is subject to time dilation, making time pass differently within the combat arena.
(time-sensitive) The villain possesses an artifact that allows them to rewind time and undo mistakes.
(time-sensitive) The hero must exploit temporal anomalies to gain an advantage over the villain.
(knowledge advantage) The foe has studied the hero's techniques and weaknesses extensively.
(knowledge advantage) The hero encounters an enemy with a vast repository of ancient battle knowledge.
(knowledge advantage) The villain gains insights from a clairvoyant, who predicts the hero's actions.
(knowledge advantage) The battle takes place in a sacred library with secrets that could turn the tide.
(spiritual connection) The foe is supernaturally linked to a powerful entity, channeling its energy.
(spiritual connection) The hero faces an enemy who can merge their soul with a celestial being.
(spiritual connection) The villain draws strength from a dark pact with an otherworldly creature.
(spiritual connection) The battle occurs within the domain of a divine spirit that influences the fight.
(reality manipulation) The foe can alter reality temporarily, reshaping the battlefield at will.
(reality manipulation) The hero must distinguish between illusions and reality during the battle.
(reality manipulation) The villain can trap the hero in nightmarish alternate realities.
(reality manipulation) The battle takes place in a realm where imagination shapes the environment.
(emotional manipulation) The villain exploits the hero's emotions and trauma against them.
(emotional manipulation) The hero encounters an enemy who can induce powerful illusions of loved ones.
(emotional manipulation) The foe has an artifact that heightens their emotions, making them unpredictable.
(emotional manipulation) The battle takes place in a surreal dreamscape, amplifying emotional responses.
(cosmic interference) The hero is affected by cosmic forces beyond their control, altering their abilities.
(cosmic interference) The foe wields a weapon empowered by the energy of distant celestial bodies.
(cosmic interference) The villain is influenced by cosmic alignments, granting them unpredictable abilities.
(cosmic interference) The battle takes place on a meteorite hurtling through space, affecting gravity.
(morphing enemy) The foe can change shape and adapt their abilities to counter the hero's actions.
(morphing enemy) The hero faces an adversary capable of transforming into different elements or materials.
(morphing enemy) The villain can merge with their surroundings, becoming nearly invisible.
(morphing enemy) The battle occurs in a living labyrinth where the environment itself is the enemy.
(environmental hazard) The battle takes place in a volcano, and the hero must avoid lava streams.
(environmental hazard) The foe commands deadly weather patterns to hinder the hero's movements.
(environmental hazard) The hero is fighting underwater, dealing with pressure and limited oxygen.
(environmental hazard) The villain uses an ancient artifact to trigger earthquakes during combat.
(technological advantage) The foe wields advanced technology far superior to the hero's capabilities.
(technological advantage) The hero faces an enemy with a powered exoskeleton and energy weapons.
(technological advantage) The villain employs cloaking devices to ambush the hero repeatedly.
(technological advantage) The battle occurs in a high-tech facility with automated defenses.
(psychological warfare) The hero must confront their deepest fears brought to life by the villain.
(psychological warfare) The foe uses a psychic's illusions to deceive and torment the hero's mind.
(psychological warfare) The villain exploits the hero's conscience, making it difficult to take lethal actions.
(psychological warfare) The battle takes place within a realm governed by the hero's subconscious.
(dimensional rift) The foe can manipulate dimensional portals to summon allies or launch surprise attacks.
(dimensional rift) The hero must navigate through shifting dimensions to reach the villain.
(dimensional rift) The villain seeks to tear open a permanent portal to a dangerous realm.
(dimensional rift) The battle takes place on the border between two merging dimensions.
(price of victory) The hero discovers that defeating the villain comes at a personal cost.
(price of victory) The foe holds hostages, and the hero's actions could endanger them.
(price of victory) The villain threatens to destroy a cherished location unless the hero surrenders.
(price of victory) The battle takes place in a realm where the hero's allies are cursed and weakened.
(betrayal) One of the hero's trusted companions is secretly working for the enemy.
(betrayal) The villain manipulates the hero's allies into turning against them.
(betrayal) The hero faces a foe they once spared, who now seeks vengeance.
(betrayal) The battle takes place in a treacherous landscape filled with false allies.
(bargain) The villain offers the hero a deal that could grant them immense power, but at what cost?
(bargain) The hero learns of a ritual that could weaken the villain, but it requires a terrible sacrifice.
(bargain) The foe proposes a truce, suggesting a common enemy that poses a greater threat.
(bargain) The battle takes place during a celestial event where cosmic bargains can be made.
(cursed artifact) The villain wields a cursed weapon that saps the hero's strength with each strike.
(cursed artifact) The hero must break the curse on an artifact before they can harm the villain.
(cursed artifact) The foe commands cursed minions that are immune to conventional attacks.
(cursed artifact) The battle takes place in a cursed land, where magic and abilities are unpredictable.
(celestial intervention) The hero gains temporary celestial powers to challenge the formidable villain.
(celestial intervention) The villain seeks to overthrow a divine being, and the hero is caught in the middle.
(celestial intervention) The foe is granted immense power by cosmic entities that must be dealt with first.
(celestial intervention) The battle unfolds in a realm where celestial beings clash for supremacy.
(empowerment challenge) The hero must complete a series of trials to unlock their true potential.
(empowerment challenge) The foe absorbs power from the environment, and the hero can do the same.
(empowerment challenge) The villain grows stronger as they defeat the hero's allies, absorbing their essence.
(empowerment challenge) The battle is a race to collect ancient artifacts that grant immense power.
(fate's design) The hero and villain are bound by a prophecy, and the outcome seems predetermined.
(fate's design) The villain believes they are destined to win, and the hero must shatter that belief.
(fate's design) The hero's fate is tied to an ancient relic that can tip the balance of the battle.
(fate's design) The battle takes place on a sacred site where fate's threads are tightly woven.
(time manipulation) The foe has the ability to rewind time and undo the hero's actions.
(time manipulation) The hero is trapped in a time loop, reliving the battle until they find a way to win.
(time manipulation) The villain accelerates time, making the hero age rapidly during the fight.
(time manipulation) The battle takes place in a temporal anomaly where past and future collide.
(final stand) The hero faces the villain's relentless onslaught with no chance of escape.
(final stand) The foe threatens to unleash cataclysmic destruction if the hero doesn't surrender.
(final stand) The hero's allies have fallen, and the fate of the world rests solely on their shoulders.
(final stand) The battle takes place in a crumbling reality on the brink of annihilation.
